markdown:
# Crystal Clawz Social Studio MVP Readiness Audit

Generated: 2026-06-12T06:36:31.481Z
Campaign: cc-rubber-base-demo-2026-06-10
Overall status: blocked_by_human_review
MVP complete: no

## Gates

- planAndBrand: ready - MVP plan and brand context are present.
- contentPlan: ready - UGC video, paid ad video, and normal post assets are planned behind review gates.
- brandClaimLedger: ready - Brand rules, claim sources, blocked claims, and required visuals are attached to every asset.
- productionPackets: ready - Per-asset production packets exist for UGC video, paid ad video, and normal post.
- productionQueue: ready - Production queue maps generated and pending assets without allowing publishing.
- reviewBoard: ready - Review board exposes human decisions only for generated assets.
- moneyprinterDraft: ready - MoneyPrinterTurbo draft video is present.
- reviewPacket: ready - Review packet and media are available.
- humanApproval: blocked - Human approval is still required.
- manualPostizHandoff: ready - Manual Postiz preview package exists but is not approved.
- postizApiDryRun: blocked - Postiz API draft dry-run package is missing or not safe.
- noLivePosting: ready - No live posting, scheduling, or publishing has been enabled.
- verification: ready - Tests, build, secret scan, and UI path-leak scan must pass.
- finalPublish: not_in_scope - Publishing is intentionally outside this draft-only MVP.

## Next Actions

- Complete human review of the MP4/contact sheet and record approve, needs_revision, or reject.
- Keep Postiz draft creation blocked until approval evidence exists.
